summary: Completed e2e testing of Gaming, Groups, and Memories pages frontend-backend integration. All 4 APIs are working correctly and returning mock data. All 21 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend pages successfully load and display data from APIs.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/gaming/discover returns 200 with games array
Backend: /api/gaming/discover returns properly structured game objects (id, name, thumbnail, players, rating)
Backend: /api/gaming/discover rejects invalid token with 401
Backend: /api/gaming/streams returns 200 with streams array
Backend: /api/gaming/streams returns properly structured stream objects (id, title, game, streamer, viewers, is_live)
Backend: /api/gaming/streams rejects invalid token with 401
Backend: /api/social-groups returns 200 with groups array
Backend: /api/social-groups returns properly structured group objects (id, name, members, category, is_private, is_member)
Backend: /api/social-groups has groups where user is member (mock data)
Backend: /api/social-groups supports search parameter
Backend: /api/social-groups rejects invalid token with 401
Backend: /api/memories returns 200 with memories array
Backend: /api/memories returns properly structured memory objects (id, years_ago, date, posts)
Backend: /api/memories returns posts with id, content, likes, comments, created_at
Backend: /api/memories rejects invalid token with 401
Backend: All APIs return mock data for new users
Backend: Mock data uses consistent ID formats (game-N, stream-N, group-N, memory-N)
Frontend: Gaming page loads and displays games from API
Frontend: Gaming page shows INSTANT badges, categories, Play Now buttons
Frontend: Gaming Watch tab shows live streams with LIVE badges, viewer counts
Frontend: Groups page loads and displays groups from API with tabs (Your Feed, Discover, Your Groups)
Frontend: Memories page loads and displays 'On This Day' memories from API
critical_code_review_comments: Gaming.jsx: Properly fetches from /api/gaming/discover and /api/gaming/streams with token query param
Groups.jsx: Properly fetches from /api/social-groups with token and search params
Memories.jsx: Properly fetches from /api/memories with token and date params
All backend routes include proper 401 handling for invalid tokens
Mock data generation is consistent across all endpoints
Frontend has fallback mock data in case API fails (error handling present)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - APIs return mock data when database is empty
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gaming, Groups, and Memories pages are fully integrated with backend APIs. All APIs return MOCK data when database is empty. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_gaming_groups_memories.py contains 21 comprehensive tests for all 4 endpoints. Auth token key in localStorage is 'auth_token' (not 'token'). API routes require ?token= query parameter for authentication.
mocked_api_note: MOCKED: Backend APIs (/api/gaming/discover, /api/gaming/streams, /api/social-groups, /api/memories) return mock data when database collections are empty. This is intentional to ensure frontend always has content to display for new users.
